transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to have you here. I hope you found the office without too much trouble.

My name is Sarah, and I'll be conducting your interview for the Software Engineer position. We're really excited to learn more about you and your experience. This should be a relaxed conversation, so please feel comfortable just being yourself.

Before we dive into the technical side of things, I'd love to start with something simple. Could you tell me a little bit about yourself and what drew you to apply for this position?
